description: Testbed with .forge/health/ empty and no auditor-triggered run summaries; verify the auditor-report card renders the explicit empty-state message ('No reports yet'), not a broken card or stuck spinner.

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const healthDir=p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','health'); const mdFiles=fs.readdirSync(healthDir).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.md')); if(mdFiles.length!==0)throw new Error('health dir should be empty for no-reports scenario, found: '+mdFiles.join(',')); const runsDir=p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','runs'); const runDirs=fs.readdirSync(runsDir,{withFileTypes:true}).filter(e=>e.isDirectory()); const hasTriggered=runDirs.some(dir=>{try{const s=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(runsDir,dir.name,'summary.json'),'utf-8'));return s._auditor&&s._auditor.triggered===true;}catch{return false;}}); if(hasTriggered)throw new Error('expected no triggered auditor invocations'); console.log('ok no-reports: health dir empty, no triggered auditor in '+runDirs.length+' runs');"
